subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-28 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The people of every religion, nation and race--all the peoples of the world--must so abandon their idle prejudices
subcodes.first_line_orig: باید اهل ادیان و اوطان و اجناس جمیع ملل عالم ترک تعصبات باطله و امتیازات
subcodes.subjects: @oneness; unity of religion, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @contention and conflict
